name: slip
content: in the back of my throat. the black,
the last unfinished, my throat sore, but not-
too sore to laugh, to scoff at my weakness,
purity. just like this puff, she fades back-
like some unpaid loan, and i just want more,
and in the morning i'll roar, or cry, or sit-
and look at the sky, and wonder:
